titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Sahl
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Sahl

segments: ه عن محمّد بن سهل فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سهل بن اليسع الأشعريّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن سهل فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن سهل بن اليسع الأشعريّ‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sahl ibn Al-Yasaʿ Al-Ashari.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Muhammad ibn Sahl ibn Al-Yasaʿ Al-Ashari.
